mapper.sql: user_id AS userId, email AS email, password_hash AS passwordHash, nickname AS nickname, role AS role, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM APP_USER WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT
FROM APP_USER WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.email AS email, u.password_hash AS passwordHash, u.nickname AS nickname, u.role AS role, u.status AS status, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM APP_USER u INNER JOIN OAUTH_ACCOUNT oa ON oa.user_id = u.user_id WHERE oa.provider = #{provider} AND oa.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.email AS email, u.password_hash AS passwordHash, u.nickname AS nickname, u.role AS role, u.status AS status, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM APP_USER u INNER JOIN OAUTH_ACCOUNT oa ON oa.user_id = u.user_id WHERE oa.provider = #{provider} AND oa.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_USER ( email, password_hash, nickname, role, status ) VALUES ( #{user.email}, #{user.passwordHash}, #{user.nickname}, COALESCE(#{user.role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{user.status}, 'ACTIVE') )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_USER SET email = #{deletedEmail}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'DELETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OAUTH_ACCOUNT ( user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email} )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_USER SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_USER SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_USER SET email = #{deletedEmail}, status = 'DELETED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_USER SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
